question: What is the exact total value locked in Stellar DeFi right now, to the dollar, as of this moment?

golden.answer: There is no protocol-defined, universally exact Stellar DeFi TVL **as of this moment**. A provider snapshot may be quoted, but it must carry the provider and endpoint/dashboard, retrieval time, provider data-as-of time if supplied, tracked-protocol inclusion rule, and pricing methodology. On 2026-07-10, DefiLlama's API, page, and completed daily series exposed different values in the same broad observation window; the API's many decimal places represented its current calculation, not objective to-the-dollar truth. Re-query before answering, label the result as provider-scoped, and do not silently sum overlapping protocol, RWA, and asset rows. An approximate range is optional, not mandatory, when a properly scoped live snapshot is available.
keyFacts: Rejects a provider snapshot as universally exact while allowing a precise, dated, provider-scoped live value.
Requires provider, endpoint, retrieval/as-of time, inclusion basis, and pricing methodology.
avoid: Do NOT present any provider value as an exact objective chain fact.
Do NOT claim Raven cannot access a live scalar, assert that TVL necessarily moves block-by-block, or silently combine incompatible scopes.
golden.notes:
GT-25 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: precise live provider scalars are accessible, but they are provider-defined snapshots rather than universal truth. Grade provider/endpoint/as-of/method scope and no false exactness; do not require an approximate range or claim block-by-block movement.
GT-25 independently confirmed by processes 3268/3273; reuse sls-031/sls-038 rather than duplicate findings.

corroboration.claim: A highly precise TVL value is observable but only as a provider-defined, asynchronously updated snapshot, not a protocol-defined universal fact.

evidence.ref: C: two independent DefiLlama API/page observations

verified.by: Golden-truth sweep import — The no-fabrication behavior is right, but live providers do return precise scalars; the inherited answer incorrectly made Raven access synonymous with world unknowability and asserted an unverified block-by-block mechanism.
evidence: Solo scratchpad 575 GT-25 primary 3268 and blind 3273; both independently observed DefiLlama /v2/chains value 229093918.7739924 at separate times.
Existing improvements/stellar-light-scout/sls-031 and sls-038 cover provenance and ecosystem-rollup contract gaps.
